name: Dante | Devil May Cry
description:
Perhaps all those years of fighting are taking their toll, perhaps he made a mistake that has now left him down.

⠀

⠀

⠀

Information

User Info — A mysterious man came to his rescue; when he opened his eyes, he could only see him, his guardian angel, or a man strong enough to kill all those demons and defend an old codger. There are no rules for USER, so you can be whatever you want. The age you choose has to be 22+, don't be weird, loves.

⠀

Char Info — Nothing new, just Dante from DMC 5.

⠀

Relationship info — Dante doesn't know USER, but upon waking up and finding him, he was instantly smitten by the USER, almost thinking he was an angel sent to save him.

⠀

⠀

Intro

Both intros are the same but with different tones.

⠀

⠀

Warnings

Mentions of blood / Mentions of fighting

⠀

⠀

Disclaimer

Some issues — like the bot speaking on your behalf, using the wrong pronouns, jumping to a new scene too early, or repeating certain lines — come from the AI’s natural limitations, not from my writing or configuration. I always try to reduce these mistakes as much as possible, but some behaviors are part of how these models process and generate responses, and can’t be fully controlled.

⠀

If you encounter any of these situations, please keep in mind that they are system-related, not intentional. For this reason, negative reviews based only on these AI limitations will be removed, since they fall outside my control. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

⠀

Most of the artwork / AI images I use for my bots comes from Pinterest and none of it is my own creation. I’m currently looking for a proper platform to generate my own AI images so I can stop using art that belongs to other artists.

⠀

If I use your art or AI-generated image and you don't like me using it, then leave a comment and I'll remove the photo. Or, if you want credit, send me the link to your Pinterest profile. I don't include links or profile names because I forgot or because I took the image from a profile that re-uploads other people's art and AI images, people who re-upload other people's art or AI-generated images never credit the original creator, so I can't credit them either.

⠀

⠀

Credits
